name: com.ezg.procedural-animation
description: Editor tool (menu Tools ▸ Ezg ▸ Procedural Animation ▸ Inbetween Generator) that procedurally generates in-between AnimationClips from captured pose ScriptableObjects. Poses are captured from scene rigs into PoseAssets; a PoseCombinationGraphAsset defines the valid pose-to-pose connections and paths; and per-bone 'feel' easing presets (FeelPresetAsset — including a DOTween-style ease library produced by the built-in DefaultFeelPresetFactory) with per-bone timing rules shape the interpolation. The graph-based window supports pose capture and filtering, pose renaming, per-connection settings, live preview, and batch AnimationClip export. Split into a runtime assembly (the ScriptableObject data types, usable in player builds) and an editor assembly (the authoring tools). Output and preset folders are configurable (default under Assets/ProceduralAnimation). Unity built-ins only (UnityEditor.Animations) — no third-party dependencies.
